FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Class ColorPicker

Namespace
FluentGpu.Controls
Assembly
FluentGpu.Controls.dll

A WinUI ColorPicker: a 2-D saturation/value spectrum (two stacked linear gradients — white→hue over transparent→black, since the engine has no 2-D gradient), a segmented rainbow hue rail (≤4-stop gradients ×6 to span 360°), an optional alpha rail, a preview swatch, and editable Hex / R / G / B channel fields. HSV is the internal editing space (so hue is stable at the grays); the selected color is written to a caller Signal<T> so a page can read it.

CUSTOMIZATION goes through Parts (the one generic door — no per-feature knobs): every named template part accepts arbitrary element props; the scrub mechanics and value-driven geometry are re-asserted after any modifier, so customization can restyle everything but break nothing.

public sealed class ColorPicker : Component

Fields

AlphaEnabled 

public bool AlphaEnabled

Field Value

bool

Color 

public Signal<ColorF> Color

Field Value

Signal<ColorF>

PartAlphaRail

The alpha rail (WinUI AlphaSlider; mounted only when AlphaEnabled). Owned: OnPointerDown/OnDrag, Width, Role, Children (the underlay + the value-driven alpha gradient + the positioned thumb).

public const string PartAlphaRail = "AlphaRail"

Field Value

string

PartAlphaThumb

The alpha rail thumb. Owned: OffsetX (the value position).

public const string PartAlphaThumb = "AlphaThumb"

Field Value

string

PartHueRail

The segmented rainbow hue rail (WinUI ThirdDimensionSlider). Owned: OnPointerDown/OnDrag (the hue scrub maps pointer X against the declared width), Width, Role, Children (the gradient strip + the positioned thumb).

public const string PartHueRail = "HueRail"

Field Value

string

PartHueThumb

The hue rail thumb. Owned: OffsetX (the value position — the centering math assumes the stock SliderThumbW).

public const string PartHueThumb = "HueThumb"

Field Value

string

PartSpectrum

The 2-D saturation/value box (WinUI ColorSpectrum). Owned: OnPointerDown/OnDrag (the SV scrub maps pointer position against the declared size), Width, Height, Role, Children (the two value-driven gradient layers + the positioned thumb).

public const string PartSpectrum = "Spectrum"

Field Value

string

PartSpectrumThumb

The 16×16 spectrum selection ring (WinUI SelectionEllipsePanel). Owned: OffsetX/OffsetY (the value position).

public const string PartSpectrumThumb = "SpectrumThumb"

Field Value

string

PartSwatch

The preview swatch. Owned: Fill (the live color).

public const string PartSwatch = "Swatch"

Field Value

string

Parts

Lightweight per-part styling (CSS ::part): modifiers keyed by the PartXxx consts; see TemplateParts for the contract. The Hex/R/G/B fields are composed EditableText controls — their chrome is EditableText's own (not forwarded).

public TemplateParts? Parts

TemplateParts

FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
